scripts.build:lambdas: npx esbuild services/product-api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/product-api/index.js && npx esbuild services/order-api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/order-api/index.js && npx esbuild services/checkout-service/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/checkout-service/index.js && npx esbuild services/notification/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/notification/index.js && npx esbuild services/order-processing/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/order-processing/index.js && npx esbuild services/payment-webhook/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/payment-webhook/index.js && npx esbuild services/auth-triggers/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/auth-triggers/index.js && npx esbuild services/auth-post-confirmation/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/auth-post-confirmation/index.js && npx esbuild services/auth-pre-signup/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/auth-pre-signup/index.js && npx esbuild services/campaign-api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/campaign-api/index.js && npx esbuild services/campaign-fanout/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/campaign-fanout/index.js && npx esbuild services/contact-api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --external:@aws-sdk/* --outfile=services/contact-api/index.js
scripts.setup:local: npm run build:lambdas && cd infrastructure && npx cdk deploy --all --require-approval never --outputs-file ../frontend/cdk-outputs.json && cd ../frontend && npx ts-node generate-env.ts
